comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting manual acceptance test on real device: running demos/clock_realtime.py and validating realtime clock update behavior.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Acceptance test PASSED. Ran demos/clock_realtime.py in push mode on real device (--fps 1 --render-lead-ms 1000 --no-second-hand --delivery push). Observed successful connect, minute-cycle clockface selection, and repeated frame pushes; stopped cleanly with Ctrl+C.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Superseded by three-hand clock acceptance work. PASS criteria for active clock validation: second hand continuously advances for 30s and hour/minute match current time, with explicit user visual confirmation.
